title: Fabric Optimized
body:
![Optimized Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bae7facf4e3ca678d606c318d3de10d2d4f62ed.png)

# Welcome to Optimized Fabric Pack!

**I have collected a lot of optimizing mods and settings in this pack.**

The assembly is designed **for all computers**, weak and powerful.
You can comfortably **play without lags and freezes**.
At the same time, you can add your own mods to this assembly.
**Enjoy high fps!**

Supported Versions -

1.16.5 - 1.21.10

**Good Luck!**
